name: panedora
description: A premium Pandora client with a Spotify-inspired native interface

scripts.build: npm run obfuscate && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:win: npm run obfuscate && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:mac: npm run obfuscate && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:linux: npm run obfuscate && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js
